name: Akaso V50 X New Version Action Camera
description: The V50 X Action Camera with Microphone Pack from AKASO captures UHD 4K video at 30 fps and 20MP JPEG images in many action-packed applications—from diving under the sea to mountain biking—thanks to its included mounts and accessories, which include an external microphone for capturing high-quality audio.

features.Key Features :: Capture up to UHD 4K Video at 30 fps | Up to 20MP JPEG Photos | Adjustable 170° Field of View | Electronic Image Stabilization | Time-Lapse, Slow motion, Dive Modes | Touchscreen Display | 90-Minute Battery Life | 2.4 GH Wi-Fi, App Compatible
features.Standard Package: AKASO V50 X Action Camera | 2 x 1350mAh Battery | Battery Charger | Waterproof Housing | Remote Control | Handlebar/Pole Mount | 7 x Mount | 2 x Helmet Mount | Bandage | 5 x Tether | Protective Back Door | USB-C Cable
